default.notes: Public WebVM Debian image. Used as a fallback so the page boots even before the rust-alpine release pipeline has run; cargo/rustup work from inside via apt + curl.

warm.notes: Pre-baked rust-alpine.ext2 — i386 Alpine + bash + rustc + cargo + a hello-world Cargo project under /workspace/hello. Built by web/disk/build.sh and uploaded to GitHub Releases by .github/workflows/disk-image.yml. Populate `url` here once the release asset is published; the boot shell will switch to it automatically.
